a.xlink:title: Core layout and rendering logic for worksheet cells.
The definition of the base class of all cells the worksheet consists of.
Declares the cell list management functionality.
This file defines the class GroupCell that bundles input and output in the worksheet.
This file declares the class Image.
Implementation of an observing weak Cell pointer.
Declares the various iterators useful with the Cell class.
This file declares everything needed for the text style system used to style all the elements on the ...
Declares "mostly read-only" wrappers around values that are expensive to compute and are thus cached.
This file declares a message dialog that sends its contents to the log message sink.
Declares FontRenderabilityCache: which chars can each font render?
Declares MaximaSessionInfo: what we know about the connected Maxima.
Declares RenderContext: the per-render-pass state of a worksheet.
This file declares the class Styles.
This file contains the definition of the class EditorCell.
